category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular IoT device compliance comparison for export from China to South Africa.

title.en: China-to-South Africa Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (ICASA)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入南非：ICASA合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入南非：ICASA合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against South Africa ICASA type approval under the Electronic Communications Act No. 36 of 2005, SABS/SANS EMC standards, NRCS electrical safety Letter of Authority, local importer/dealer requirements, and the South Africa Cybersecurity Policy Framework advisory.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与南非依据《电子通信法》第36号（2005年）的ICASA型式批准、SABS/SANS电磁兼容标准、NRCS电气安全授权函、本地进口商/经销商要求以及南非网络安全政策框架建议的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與南非依據《電子通訊法》第36號（2005年）的ICASA型式批准、SABS/SANS電磁相容標準、NRCS電氣安全授權函、本地進口商/經銷商要求以及南非網絡安全政策框架建議的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, ICASA type approval, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current ICASA regulations, applicable SANS/SABS standards, NRCS compulsory specifications, and South Africa market entry obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in South Africa.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、ICASA型式批准、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于南非销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行ICASA法规、适用SANS/SABS标准、NRCS强制规格及南非市场准入义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、ICASA型式批准、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於南非銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行ICASA法規、適用SANS/SABS標準、NRCS強制規格及南非市場准入義務。

answer_first.en: The main South Africa gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or IoT device are mandatory ICASA type approval under the Electronic Communications Act No. 36 of 2005 (CE and FCC not recognised), SABS/SANS EMC compliance (SANS 55032 / SANS 55035), NRCS Letter of Authority for in-scope electrical products including power adapters, appointment of a local South African importer or authorised dealer for ICASA registration, and advisory alignment with the South Africa Cybersecurity Policy Framework. CCC is not recognised in South Africa.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙或物联网设备进入南非的主要差距包括：依据《电子通信法》第36号（2005年）的强制性ICASA型式批准（CE和FCC不予承认）、SABS/SANS电磁兼容合规（SANS 55032 / SANS 55035）、含电源适配器在内的特定电气产品的NRCS授权函、为完成ICASA注册而委任南非本地进口商或授权经销商，以及与南非网络安全政策框架的建议性对接。CCC认证不被南非承认。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙或物聯網裝置進入南非的主要差距包括：依據《電子通訊法》第36號（2005年）的強制性ICASA型式批准（CE和FCC不予承認）、SABS/SANS電磁相容合規（SANS 55032 / SANS 55035）、含電源適配器在內的特定電氣產品的NRCS授權函、為完成ICASA註冊而委任南非本地進口商或授權經銷商，以及與南非網絡安全政策框架的建議性對接。CCC認證不被南非承認。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
